records.question: Which molecules have atoms with element equal to 'zn' and also have bonds?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id FROM molecule
JOIN atom ON molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id
JOIN bond ON molecule.molecule_id = bond.molecule_id
WHERE atom.element = 'zn'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE a.element = 'zn'
AND EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM bond b WHERE b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
)

records.question: What molecules with a label of + contain bromine atoms?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id FROM molecule
JOIN atom ON molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id
WHERE atom.element = 'br' AND molecule.label = '+'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT molecule.molecule_id
FROM molecule
JOIN atom ON molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id
WHERE molecule.label = '+' AND atom.element = 'Br'

records.question: Which molecules that have at least one atom with element equal to 'na' and at least one bond also have the label equal to '-'?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id FROM molecule
JOIN atom ON molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id
JOIN bond ON molecule.molecule_id = bond.molecule_id
WHERE molecule.label = '-' AND atom.element = 'na'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id
FROM molecule
WHERE molecule.label = '-'
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM atom
    WHERE atom.molecule_id = molecule.molecule_id
      AND atom.element = 'na'
)
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM bond
    WHERE bond.molecule_id = molecule.molecule_id
)

records.question: Which molecules have a label that is '-' and contain atoms where the element is exactly 'na'?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id FROM molecule
JOIN atom ON molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id
WHERE molecule.label = '-' AND atom.element = 'na'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id
FROM molecule
JOIN atom ON molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id
WHERE molecule.label = '-' AND atom.element = 'na'

records.question: Which molecules have a label of '-' and contain phosphorus atoms connected by single bonds?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id FROM molecule
JOIN atom ON molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id
JOIN bond ON molecule.molecule_id = bond.molecule_id
WHERE molecule.label = '-' AND bond.bond_type = '-' AND atom.element = 'p'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a1 ON m.molecule_id = a1.molecule_id
JOIN connected c ON a1.atom_id = c.atom_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
WHERE m.label = '-'
  AND a1.element = 'P'
  AND a2.element = 'P'
  AND b.bond_type = 'single'

records.question: Which molecules have a negative label and contain carbon atoms connected by triple bonds?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id FROM molecule
JOIN atom ON molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id
JOIN bond ON molecule.molecule_id = bond.molecule_id
WHERE bond.bond_type = '#' AND atom.element = 'c' AND molecule.label = '-'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a1 ON m.molecule_id = a1.molecule_id
JOIN atom a2 ON m.molecule_id = a2.molecule_id
JOIN connected c ON (
  (c.atom_id = a1.atom_id AND c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id)
  OR
  (c.atom_id = a2.atom_id AND c.atom_id2 = a1.atom_id)
)
JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id AND b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE m.label LIKE '-%'
  AND a1.element = 'C'
  AND a2.element = 'C'
  AND b.bond_type = 'triple'

records.question: Which molecules contain bonds that are exactly triple bonds?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id FROM molecule
JOIN bond ON molecule.molecule_id = bond.molecule_id
WHERE bond.bond_type = '#'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id
FROM molecule
JOIN bond ON molecule.molecule_id = bond.molecule_id
WHERE bond.bond_type = 'triple'
GROUP BY molecule.molecule_id

records.question: Which molecules have a label of + and contain both an atom with element p and a bond where the bond type is exactly -?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id FROM molecule
JOIN atom ON molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id
JOIN bond ON molecule.molecule_id = bond.molecule_id
WHERE atom.element = 'p' AND molecule.label = '+' AND bond.bond_type = '-'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT m.molecule_id
FROM molecule m
WHERE m.label = '+'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM atom a
    WHERE a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id AND a.element = 'p'
  )
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM bond b
    WHERE b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id AND b.bond_type = '-'
  )

records.question: Which molecules labeled + contain atoms with element na and have bonds where bond_type is -?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id FROM molecule
JOIN atom ON molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id
JOIN bond ON molecule.molecule_id = bond.molecule_id
WHERE atom.element = 'na' AND bond.bond_type = '-' AND molecule.label = '+'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id

records.question: Which molecules have a label of '-' and contain fluorine atoms connected by bonds that are exactly double bonds?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id FROM molecule
JOIN atom ON molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id
JOIN bond ON molecule.molecule_id = bond.molecule_id
WHERE bond.bond_type = '=' AND molecule.label = '-' AND atom.element = 'f'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id OR a.atom_id = c.atom_id2
JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
WHERE m.label = '-'
  AND a.element = 'F'
  AND b.bond_type = 'double'

records.question: What molecules have a label exactly '-' and contain bonds where the bond type is exactly '-' with atoms whose element is exactly 'f'?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id FROM molecule
JOIN atom ON molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id
JOIN bond ON molecule.molecule_id = bond.molecule_id
WHERE molecule.label = '-' AND bond.bond_type = '-' AND atom.element = 'f'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a ON (a.atom_id = c.atom_id OR a.atom_id = c.atom_id2)
WHERE m.label = '-' AND b.bond_type = '-' AND a.element = 'f'

records.question: Which molecules have a label that is '-' and contain fluorine atoms connected by single bonds?

FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a1 ON m.molecule_id = a1.molecule_id
JOIN connected c ON a1.atom_id = c.atom_id
